scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=mcp-server && npm run build --workspace=mcp-bridge
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=backend && npm run typecheck --workspace=frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace=mcp-server && npm run typecheck --workspace=mcp-bridge
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm run lint --workspace=frontend
